channel.title: GitHub HCL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
item.description: Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦

item.title: GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-foundation-fabric
item.description: End-to-end modular samples and landing zones toolkit for Terraform on GCP.

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS VPC resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
item.description: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦

item.title: GoogleCloudPlatform/cluster-toolkit
item.description: Cluster Toolkit is an open-source software offered by Google Cloud which makes it easy for customers to deploy AI/ML and HPC environments on Google Cloud.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
item.description: Terraform Module to define an EFS Filesystem (aka NFS)

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
item.description: Terraform module to generate well-formed JSON documents (container definitions) that are passed to the aws_ecs_task_definition Terraform resource

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
item.description: Terraform module that creates an S3 bucket with an optional IAM user for external CI/CD systems

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-s3-log-storage
item.description: This module creates an S3 bucket suitable for receiving logs from other AWS services such as S3, CloudFront, and CloudTrail
